profile.name: Philip Mello
profile.title: Senior Linux Administrator · DevOps Cloud Engineer · Kubernetes Specialist
profile.summary: Senior Linux and DevOps professional with 15+ years of experience building, operating, troubleshooting, and automating cloud-native infrastructure across Linux, Kubernetes, AWS, Azure, and GCP environments.
about: Senior Linux and DevOps professional with 15+ years of experience across enterprise support, Linux systems administration, cloud infrastructure, CI/CD, observability, and Kubernetes operations.

Experienced in building and operating production-grade platforms using Linux, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, reverse proxies, web middleware, databases, and multi-cloud services across AWS, Azure, and GCP.

Strong background in troubleshooting complex infrastructure issues, automating operational workflows, securing public endpoints, and supporting high-availability services for large enterprise environments.

description: Designed and provisioned cloud infrastructure from scratch using Terraform as Infrastructure as Code, including Kubernetes/EKS foundations, VPC networking, bastion access, EC2, S3, and secure application connectivity.
Built and maintained Jenkins and Azure DevOps pipelines to automate CI/CD workflows for Vodafone applications and infrastructure updates.
Secured public application endpoints with Cloudflare WAF, using Terraform-managed configuration and controlled delivery through Azure Pipelines.

Operated Linux-based middleware and application environments involving HAProxy, Nginx, Apache HTTPD, Tomcat, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Citrix, Datadog, AWS CodeCommit, Jupyter, GitHub Actions, and GitHub Pages.
Worked across AWS, Azure, and GCP environments, supporting cloud-native delivery, automation, and operational reliability.
Created and maintained deployment pipelines for new features, fixes, and channels on nostv.pt, supporting controlled delivery into production environments.
Monitored critical multimedia services, including set-top boxes and web platforms, investigating HTTP 4xx/5xx errors, service degradation, and application-level metrics.
Operated and troubleshot Linux server environments running HAProxy, Nginx, Apache HTTPD, Tomcat, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Kubernetes, and Docker workloads.
Worked with Elastic Stack, OpenSearch, Grafana, Kibana, and the in-house alarmistic tool TheSys to support observability, incident analysis, and service availability.
Supported in-house CI/CD processes and cloud-connected infrastructure across AWS, Azure, and GCP contexts.
Provided global support for Microsoft Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) customers using a Follow-the-Sun operational model.
Diagnosed AKS issues involving Linux nodes, Kubernetes control-plane behavior, CNI/Kubenet networking, DNS, RBAC, storage mounts, and Azure virtual machines.
Used Kusto Query Language (KQL), Microsoft internal observability tools, ticketing workflows, and monitoring signals to investigate customer-impacting incidents.
Worked with Azure Sentinel, Microsoft Firewall, Microsoft 365 ticket management, Azure networking, and platform telemetry to support AKS product reliability and customer resolution.
Provided on-site support for South32 office users, from N1 to N3 and VIP users, under a third-party contract.
Handled IT equipment assembly, dock stations, video conference rooms, rack arrangement, HP servers, and Cisco switches.
Supported vertical and horizontal server upgrades on-premise, monitored the CPD room, and negotiated data link requirements with the local operator.
Implemented IT processes including ITIL practices, ticket handling, inventory, and asset management.
Used GLPI, RustDesk, PfSense, Windows Server 2019, Google Drive, Google Docs, and backup scripts for IT deployment and operations.

experience.company: INCONNET - Projects: Unilever, SITA, British Airways, American Airlines
description: Maintained HP backup servers, data links, and routers.
Answered service calls in Rio de Janeiro and provided outsourced support services for Unilever.
Provided Level 3 service for advanced users and programmers.
Installed and configured corporate software such as SAP BI, IBM Lotus Notes, Java SDK, and related tools.
Troubleshot Level 1 and Level 2 escalated tickets and supported corporate BlackBerry users.
Worked as a micro-informatics support technician for enterprise users.
Performed banking software installation, remote support for Level 1 and Level 2 users, and configuration of equipment such as switches, routers, and servers.
Provided on-site support from N1 to N3.
Worked with Windows administration, cloud administration, network administration, security cameras, Windows system migrations, Microsoft Office support, and surveillance camera systems.

projects.name: ATM - Atomy Tools Modules
projects.description: A modular Linux CLI installer for development tools, focused on portable environments, automation, and developer workflow setup.

projects.name: TimeCoin
projects.description: A custom cryptocurrency architecture exploring time-based issuance, auditable ledger design, and Proof-of-Space-Time concepts.

projects.name: Homelab Infrastructure
projects.description: Personal Proxmox-based infrastructure with Docker services, Traefik reverse proxy, Cloudflare integration, and local virtualization.

projects.name: Local AI Assistant Architecture
projects.description: Self-hosted AI workflow concept using local LLMs, WhatsApp integration, access control, and local database infrastructure.
